nasb.text: But the next day, leaving the horsemen to go on with him, they returned to the barracks.

esv.text: And on the next day they returned to the barracks, letting the horsemen go on with him.

cnv.text: 第二天，他們把保羅交給騎兵隊護送，就回營樓去了。

ccb.text: 第二天，由骑兵继续护送，其余军兵返回军营。

csbs.text: 第二天，他们让骑兵带着保罗前行，就回到营楼。
